contentBlocks.text: If you’d like to find out more about become a client and training at the gym, working as a PT - or for to look round the gym, please get in touch.
contentBlocks.html: Find Us Located in the heart of Shoreditch, The Vault Gym is easily accessible from Old Street, Liverpool Street and Shoreditch High Street stations. seo.title: Contact The Vault Private Gym | Luxury Personal Training Gym in Shoreditch, London
seo.description: Looking for a premium private gym in Central London? The Vault Gym in Shoreditch offers exclusive personal training, just minutes from Old Street, Moorgate and Liverpool Street stations. Contact us today.
